summary: Frontend testing of NPS & CSAT page and new dashboard cards. All 18 feature requirements tested and passing.

design_issues.screen: NPS & CSAT - Survey Builder tab placeholder
issues: Placeholder text says 'Screenshot pending — this section will be built next.' which is developer-facing language, not user-friendly

action_items: Minor: Update Survey Builder tab placeholder text to be more user-friendly (e.g., 'Coming Soon' instead of 'Screenshot pending — this section will be built next.')
critical_code_review_comments: All NPS/CSAT data is static mock data in NPSCsatPage.jsx (460 lines) - acceptable for now but should be noted
NPSCsatPage.jsx is 460 lines - approaching the 700-line limit, consider splitting when adding new features
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NPS & CSAT features are working. Home dashboard shows 12 cards (4 rows of 3). NPS page at /apps/nps-csat has dark theme, 6 nav tabs, 5 KPI cards, trend chart, NPS gauge, CSAT distribution, pain points, account health. Survey Builder (/apps/survey-builder) and Email Campaigns (/apps/email-campaigns) placeholder pages work. Back to Portal navigation works. Data is all MOCKED (static in NPSCsatPage.jsx).
mocked_apis: All NPS & CSAT data is hardcoded static mock data in NPSCsatPage.jsx - no backend API calls
